samples.xml_description:
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating the validity of the input data.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating the validity of the output data.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="flag">Flag signal for controlling data processing.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="data_lock" width_description="[7:0]">Register for temporarily storing the first valid input data.</reg>
        <reg id="valid_out">Valid signal for output data.</reg>
        <reg id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">Output data register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always>
                <case>
                    <if condition="!rst_n">Reset data_out register to 0.</if>
                    <else condition="valid_in && flag">Concatenate data_lock and data_in to form data_out.</else>
                    <else condition="valid_in">Store data_in in data_lock.</else>
                </case>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always>
                <case>
                    <if condition="!rst_n">Reset valid_out register to 0.</if>
                    <else condition="valid_in && flag">Set valid_out to 1.</else>
                    <else>Set valid_out to 0.</else>
                </case>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always>
                <case>
                    <if condition="!rst_n">Reset flag signal to 0.</if>
                    <else if condition="valid_in && flag">Set flag signal to 1.</else>
                    <else if condition="valid_in">Keep flag signal at 0.</else>
                </case>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
